title: GD CraftsEnhanced
description: Add and replace recipes to improve gameplay and make certain crafts easier or more difficult.
body:
# GD CraftsEnhanced
**Add and replace recipes to improve gameplay and make certain crafts easier or more difficult.**

[![IMG Badge - Wiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/-WIKI-2c2c2c?style=for-the-badge&logo=gitbook&logoColor=white)](https://gabriel-djalayer.gitbook.io/gdteam-wiki/projects/mods/gd-craftsenhanced)
[![IMG Badge - Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/-SOURCE-2c2c2c?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/GabrielDja/GD-CraftsEnhanced)
[![IMG Badge - Download on Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/ON-CURSEFORGE-_?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=2c2c2c&color=e58e0e&logoColor=e58e0e)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gd-craftsenhanced)
[![IMG Badge - Download on Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/ON-MODRINTH-_?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&labelColor=2c2c2c&color=17b95a&logoColor=17b95a)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gd-craftsenhanced)
[![IMG Badge - Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/-SUPPORT-6d30fd?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/gabrieldja)
[![IMG Badge - GD Team](https://img.shields.io/badge/MY_WEBSITE-245cf3?style=for-the-badge)](https://gabrieldjalayer.wixsite.com/gabrieldja-gaming-yt)

### 📜 License: MIT
This pack was created by **GabrielDja**.

### ⭐ Features
- Easier and more difficult recipes
- Possibility of destroying certain items

[**The Wiki is now complete.**](https://gabriel-djalayer.gitbook.io/gdteam-wiki/creations/mods/gd-craftsenhanced)

![GD CraftsEnhanced - Preview](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/31958c_f950f07717514b6bbcaaa1a644b406fa~mv2.png)

### 🛠️ For Developers
Tags are available for use in your mod or datapack!  
⚠️ **GD CraftsEnhanced must be a dependency for your project.**
<details>
<summary>Tags</summary>

- `gd_craftsenhanced:all_banner_pattern`
- `gd_craftsenhanced:stone_slabs`

</details>
